schema.description: A user's organization membership details and workspace-level roles and permissions.

email.description: Email address of the organization member.

firstName.description: First name of the organization member.

lastName.description: Last name of the organization member.

avatar.description: Avatar image URL for the organization member.

user.title: MemberDbDto
user.description: Organization member details for the selected user.

items.description: Workspace-specific roles and permissions for a user.
A role assigned to the user in a workspace and the source of that assignment.

role.description: Workspace role name assigned to the user.

roleSourceType.description: Source of the workspace role assignment.
roleSourceType.title: WspRoleSourceType

sourceTeamId.description: Source team numeric identifier when the role is inherited from a team. Can be `null`.

sourceTeamName.description: Source team name when the role is inherited from a team. Can be `null`.

sourceTeamType.description: Source team type when the role is inherited from a team. Can be `null`.
sourceTeamType.title: TeamType

items.title: UserWorkspaceRoleDto

roles.description: Array of roles held by the user in this workspace.

items.description: A permission granted to the user in a workspace and the roles that grant it.

permission.description: Permission name granted to the user in the workspace.

roles.description: Array of role names that grant the permission.

items.title: UserWorkspacePermissionDto

permissions.description: Array of effective permissions granted to the user in this workspace.

items.title: UserWorkspaceRolesDto

userWorkspaces.description: Array of workspace-specific roles and permissions for the selected user.

schema.title: ListUserRolesResponse
